2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch documents the new UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP registration mode and its associated bit, 1 << _UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which allows tracking of every access to a registered page range. The documentation also clarifies compatibility with anonymous, shmem, and hugetlbfs ranges. The patch adds descriptions for these features in the UFFDIO_REGISTER manual page.
